name: Kentucky Hot Brown
recipeInstructions:
Cheese Sauce:
2 tablespoons margarine
2 tablespoons all-purpose flour
1 cup milk
1 cup cheddar cheese (shredded)
1/4 teaspoon salt
white pepper to taste
1. Melt the margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Blend in the flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Gradually add the milk, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted.
Hot Brown:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Spread 2 tablespoons of cheese sauce on the bottom of an individual baking dish.
3. Place a slice of toast on top of the cheese sauce.
4. Cover with 3 tablespoons of cheese sauce.
5. Add a slice of country ham and cover with another 3 tablespoons of cheese sauce.
6. Sprinkle half of the Parmesan cheese over the ham.
7. Place a slice of turkey on top and cover with 3 tablespoons of cheese sauce.
8. Sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese over the turkey.
9. Garnish with paprika and cooked bacon slices.
10. Bake for 15 minutes.
